parallelism_rules.cognitive_demand: A/B/C matched within family (not cosmetic rewording)

retired_note: Legacy S05 bank covered OOP classes/dunders/inheritance (V3 S11 territory). Replaced with V3 function/contract slugs for CP-N1-B normalizers.
